summary: Iteration 61 - All 6 requested features/fixes verified: P0 color bug (brand colors pre-populated), role rename (platform_admin), TenantSwitcher in TopNav, TenantSwitcher visibility restriction, Users tab badge colors, and new test user logins. All 14/14 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified via Playwright.

test_results.p0_color_bug_fix: PASS - GET /api/admin/website-settings returns primary_color='#0f172a' and accent_color='#ee4037'. Brand & Hero section in Website Content shows pre-populated values. CSS variables (--aa-primary, --aa-accent) applied via WebsiteContext.tsx. Active tabs use var(--aa-primary) via .aa-tab-trigger[data-state=active].
test_results.role_rename: PASS - Login as admin@automateaccounts.local returns role='platform_admin' (not 'platform_super_admin'). PLATFORM_ROLE constant in core/tenant.py is 'platform_admin'. Old role not present anywhere.
test_results.tenant_switcher_placement: PASS - TenantSwitcher (data-testid='tenant-switcher-btn') is inside [data-testid='top-nav']. Shows 'All Tenants' button in TopNav. Confirmed via Playwright and screenshot.
test_results.tenant_switcher_visibility_restriction: PASS - TenantSwitcher NOT visible for super_admin (superadmin@automateaccounts.local). Partner Orgs tab also NOT visible for super_admin. Both restricted correctly to platform_admin only.
test_results.users_tab_badge_colors: PASS - platform_admin: amber badge (bg-amber-100 text-amber-700), super_admin: purple badge (bg-purple-100 text-purple-700), admin: blue badge (bg-blue-100 text-blue-700). Verified on live users: admin@automateaccounts.local=amber, superadmin@automateaccounts.local=purple, admin2@automateaccounts.local=blue.
test_results.new_user_logins: PASS - superadmin@automateaccounts.local / Admin123! logs in successfully with role=super_admin. admin2@automateaccounts.local / Admin123! logs in successfully with role=admin.

critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: partner_super_admin role exists in the system (used for new partner orgs created via self-service) but is not the same as platform_admin. The Users tab badge logic handles platform_admin=amber, super_admin=purple, and falls through to blue for others (including partner_super_admin). This is consistent behavior.
OBSERVATION: CSS active tab color uses .aa-tab-trigger[data-state='active'] { background-color: var(--aa-primary) !important } - the brand color from app_settings is now being applied correctly.

NOTE: The P0 root cause was that admin GET /admin/website-settings only read from website_settings collection, but colors are stored in app_settings. Fixed by merging both collections in the admin GET endpoint.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used pre-existing test users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 requested fixes verified working: (1) P0 color bug: admin GET /admin/website-settings now merges app_settings + website_settings, primary_color=#0f172a, accent_color=#ee4037 returned correctly. (2) Role rename: PLATFORM_ROLE='platform_admin' in core/tenant.py, all auth routes updated. (3) TenantSwitcher moved from hero banner to TopNav.tsx for role=platform_admin. (4) super_admin cannot see TenantSwitcher or Partner Orgs tab. (5) Badge colors: platform_admin=amber, super_admin=purple, others=blue in UsersTab.tsx line 111. (6) New test users: superadmin@automateaccounts.local/Admin123!=super_admin, admin2@automateaccounts.local/Admin123!=admin. All backend APIs working correctly.
